# Docs/Architecture 鈥?Technical Structure

## Purpose
Technical architecture documentation 鈥?system diagrams, data flow maps, and Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) that explain why the system is structured this way.

## Placement Logic
Under Docs/ because architecture decisions are documentation, not code. ADRs capture the reasoning behind structural choices.

## Contents & Conventions
TECHNICAL_ARCHITECTURE.md is the master technical reference. adr-template.md scaffolds new ADRs. data-flow.md maps information movement. system-diagram.md provides visual overviews.
